name: Le Sirop De Monin Syrup
description:
An old time cocktail classic, Blue Curaçao is known for its deep blue colour, tart orange flavour and tropical credentials.

Flavoured with the dry peel of the green oranges, which are descended from Valencia oranges, from the West Indian Island of Curaçao, this liqueur embodies this tropical island paradise with its beaches and coral reefs. Discovered by accident, the drink was originally marketed by a Spanish family from Curacao in the 19th century.

The amazing deep blue of MONIN Blue Curaçao syrup evokes the sea lapping the beautiful Curacao beaches and adds an exotic touch to cocktails and sodas with its aromatic orange peel scent and candy bitter taste.

ColourDeep blue even when it dilutes.

Tasting notesOrange skin smell, candy bitter orange taste.

Beverage Innovation Directors tipsThe deep blue colour will amaze you and others, especially children. Try to combine it with a citrus flavour in soda applications.

Applications

  • Sodas
  • Cocktails
  • Fruit punches
summary_description: Le Sirop De Monin Syrup 1L: Pure cane sugar, rich flavor, perfect for coffee & creative drinks

name: Softcare Gold Baby Diapers
description:
Softcare Gold Baby Diapers' developed triple layered absorbent system can quickly and evenly absorb fluid and effectively prevent rewet to help keep baby's skin dry and healthy. The nonwoven soft top sheet makes baby feel comfortable and breathable. The leak guard and leg cuff prevents the side leakage. With the super absorbent core (blue/green ADL), Softcare Gold Baby Diapers lock and absorb the liquid quickly and keep the baby skin dry.

Product Information:

  • Leak guard and leg cuff prevent the side leakage
  • Triple layerer super absorbent core
  • Quick absorbtion system to keep baby's skin dry
summary_description: Softcare Gold Baby Diapers Large (9.1-15kg) 40 Diapers: Soft, absorbent, gentle on baby’s skin.

name: Fresh Sweet Potato
description:
These premium fresh sweet potatoes feature vibrant orange flesh that's naturally sweet and incredibly nutritious. These wholesome root vegetables are perfect for both savory dishes and healthy dessert alternatives, bringing natural sweetness and rich flavor to your kitchen.

Product Highlights:

  • Premium Quality: Hand-selected for optimal sweetness, texture, and freshness
  • Naturally Sweet: No added sugars needed - nature's candy in vegetable form
  • Nutrient Dense: Loaded with vitamins A, C, fiber, and potassium
  • Versatile Cooking: Bake, roast, mash, fry, or add to soups and stews

Nutritional Powerhouse: Exceptionally high in beta-carotene (vitamin A), supporting eye health and immune function. Rich in fiber for digestive health, potassium for heart health, and antioxidants for overall wellness. Lower glycemic index than regular potatoes.

name: Nestle Cheerios
description:
Honey Nut Cheerios is a delightful gluten-free oat cereal that brings the taste of real honey and natural almond flavour to your breakfast table. Whether you’re an adult looking for a heart-healthy breakfast or a parent seeking a gluten-free snack for the little ones, Honey Nut Cheerios has you covered. 

  • Flavour: Sweeter than the original Cheerios, Honey Nut Cheerios boasts a delicious blend of honey and almond flavours.
  • Whole Grain: Each serving provides 22g of whole grain (at least 48g recommended daily).
  • Vitamins and Minerals: Honey Nut Cheerios is a good source of calcium and an excellent source (20% daily value) of vitamin D. It also contains 12 vitamins and minerals.
  • Gluten-Free: Pour it into a bowl with ice-cold milk for an irresistible, gluten-free part of an easy breakfast. You can also pack it up for gluten-free snacks on the go or add it to homemade cereal bars.

Ingredients: Whole Grain Oats, Sugar, Corn Starch, Honey, Brown Sugar Syrup, Salt, Tripotassium Phosphate, Canola and/or Sunflower Oil, and Natural Almond Flavor. Vitamin E (mixed tocopherols) is added to preserve freshness.

Allergens: Contains almond ingredients.
summary_description: Nestlé Cheerios Honey: Healthy whole grains, Honey & nuts, 680g, fortified essential vitamins
search_tags: Nestle Cheerios,Nestle Cheerios Cereal,Honey Nut Cheerios,Multigrain Cheerios

name: Fresh Potato
description:
These fresh potatoes are sourced from trusted farms and carefully selected for quality, freshness, and flavor. These wholesome tubers are your go-to ingredient for countless delicious meals, from crispy fries to creamy mash and everything in between.


Product Highlights:

  • Farm-Fresh Quality: Hand-selected for size, texture, and freshness
  • Versatile Cooking: Perfect for baking, boiling, frying, roasting, or mashing
  • Natural Goodness: No artificial preservatives or treatments
  • Long Storage Life: Properly stored potatoes stay fresh for weeks

Nutritional Benefits: Rich in potassium, vitamin C, and fiber. A good source of complex carbohydrates for sustained energy. Naturally fat-free, gluten-free, and cholesterol-free.

Ideal for baking, frying, and mashing. Perfect for boiling, roasting, and potato salads.

Storage Instructions: Store in a cool, dark, well-ventilated area away from onions. Avoid refrigeration. Remove any sprouted or green potatoes before cooking.
summary_description: Fresh Potato: Nutritious and versatile, earthy flavor, ideal for cooking, store in a cool, dry place

This is the Family size of Yomi Vanilla, which provides extra calcium, vitamins, and protein richness to keep your body nourished, boost your immune system to keep you healthy, and is easily absorbed by the body. Yomi Vanilla has a distinct flavor that is therapeutic. Yomi is low in fat and sugar, making it ideal for a healthy lifestyle.

Yomi Vanilla is a good source of extra calcium, vitamins, and protein that will keep your body nourished while also boosting your immune system and keeping you healthy. It is also easily absorbed by the body. Yomi Vanilla has a distinct flavor that is therapeutic. Yomi is low in fat and sugar, making it ideal for a healthy lifestyle.

description:
Bel Malt wakes the goodness in you. A non-alcoholic malt drink with low sugar and gives energy. Brewed from the finest and choicest malt barley, this malt drink is a perfect malt choice for your parties and every social gathering. 

A healthy diet involves consuming appropriate amounts of all essential nutrients and an adequate amount of water. Enjoy it best served chilled.

Ingredients: Water, Barley Malt, Barley, Sugar, Caramel Color (E 150c), Carbon Dioxide, Liquor ice, Vitamins (Nicotinamide (B3), Thiamine Hydrochloride (B1), Calcium-D-Panthothenol (B5), Sodium Riboflavin Phosphate (B2), Pyridoxal Hydrochloric (B6).  

Specifications 

  • Non-alcoholic malt  
  • Low in sugar  
  • Perfect for all events  
  • Best served chilled

name: Jergens Ultra Healing Hand Cream
description:
Repair dryness at the source with Jergens Ultra Healing Moisturizer for Extra Dry Skin. The nourishing formula penetrates through five layers of skin to heal extra dry skin, improve tone and texture and leave it smooth and visibly healthier.

This hand moisturizer, with a unique hydralucence blend of ingredients plus Vitamins C, E, and B5, leaves your skin luminous and moisturized for up to 48 hours. Jergens hand lotion for women and men is carefully formulated for optimal dry skin relief. Hand cream for dry cracked hands rejuvenates cracked skin for optimal moisture. 

Product Features: 

  • Helps Relieve Dry Skin: Jergens Ultra Healing Moisturizer helps to improve skin's appearance and texture 
  • Helps To Repair Dry Skin: Penetrates five layers of skin and reduce dryness at the source
  • Visibly Healthier Skin: With continual use of Jergens Ultra Healing Dry Skin Moisturizer, skin is nourished and looks visibly healthier over time
  • Formulated With Quality Ingredients: A unique formulation, with hydralucence blend of ingredients combined with Vitamins C, E and B, to leave skin luminous

name: Fanta Plastic Bottle
description:
Fanta carbonated drink is made of carefully selected oranges. Rich in vitamin C and containing some sugar good for the body, with 100% natural flavors, is a caffeine-free bubbly, fruity, orange soft drink. Perfect size for drinking with meals

Ingredients

Carbonated water, high fructose corn syrup, citric acid, sodium benzoate (to protect taste), natural flavors, modified food starch, sodium polyphosphates, glycerol ester of rosin, yellow 6, yed 40

  • Naturally low in fat
  • Ideal for a healthy lifestyle
  • Free from cholesterol
  • It is excellent when served chilled
summary_description: Fanta Plastic Bottle: Refreshing citrus flavor, Orange, 2L, best enjoyed chilled.

name: Flemish Purple Sparkling Wine 750ml
description:
A delicious blend of tastes, fruity refreshing drink. Although the muscatel gives it a lovely sweetness, it is crisp and refreshing. You will be nicely impressed!

To be enjoyed on its own at any time, but if you must pair it, go for salads, pastas, risotto, and most Asian cuisine. Even as a light dessert wine!
summary_description: Flemish Sparkling Wine 750ml: Fruity, sweet & crisp. Perfect solo or with light meals and desserts.
